creator: karels@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #3)
I had forgotten about that commit.

I have 14.0 running on BBB.  I replaced the msdos boot partition with one from a running 13.2 system; note, I don't remember whether it was the original 13.2 version, or if I had replaced/updated it also.  I also reverted the commit that you referenced, built a kernel in an armv7 chroot on arm64, and now it is running:

FreeBSD bbb.karels.net 14.0-RELEASE FreeBSD 14.0-RELEASE #1: Tue Nov 14 19:38:57 UTC 2023     mike@rpi4.karels.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/arm.armv7/sys/GENERIC arm
